title: pyrethrum atratum
intro: Pyrethrum atratum, also known as the Purple Conehead, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pyrethrum atratum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
